statusLine.command: input=$(cat); remaining=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.remaining_percentage // empty'); if [ -n "$remaining" ]; then remaining_int=${remaining%.*}; if [ "$remaining_int" -gt 75 ]; then color="\033[32m"; elif [ "$remaining_int" -gt 50 ]; then color="\033[33m"; elif [ "$remaining_int" -gt 25 ]; then color="\033[38;5;208m"; else color="\033[31m"; fi; printf "${color}Context: ${remaining_int}%% remaining\033[0m"; else printf "Context: N/A"; fi
